$comment: The closed menu of D4 modules. An agent matching a client brief scans this file first, then reads the manifest.json of each module it intends to select. Order here is the deterministic assembly order.

modules.name: d4-site-template
modules.summary: Base Next.js site shell: layout, nav slots, home/about/contact, theme tokens. Always included.

modules.name: d4-cms-core
modules.summary: Admin shell at /admin: password + optional TOTP login, dashboard, JSON data store, image upload. Required by every content module.

modules.name: d4-careers-portal
modules.summary: Careers page with job postings and application forms, managed from the dashboard.

modules.name: d4-insights-blog
modules.summary: Blog or news section written in markdown from the dashboard.

modules.name: d4-catalog
modules.summary: Product or service catalog with categories, specs, and images, managed from the dashboard.

modules.name: d4-gallery-editor
modules.summary: Image galleries managed from the dashboard, with an embeddable Gallery component. Standalone from the catalog.
